modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Can't log into computer because another account is signed in.

full_description_text:  
I'm trying to log into the computer, but it won't let me. It says someone else is already logged in, and I can't get in. This is really frustrating because I need to use the laptop for work, but I can't do anything if I can't log in. I just want to get this sorted out so I can get back to my tasks.
short_description: Can't log into computer because another account is signed in.
